# Gods Promise Aluminium

> Gods Promise Aluminium is a leading aluminium roofing company in Lagos supplying durable roofing sheets, step tiles and stone-coated tiles across Nigeria. Fast WhatsApp quotes and nationwide delivery.

## Company Information

- **Location:** Km 38, Lagos-Abeokuta Expressway, Beside First Bank, Sango Ota, Ogun State, Nigeria
- **Phone:** +234 915 045 9964
- **Website:** https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/): Leading aluminium roofing company in Lagos — long span sheets, step tiles, stone-coated tiles and accessories for Nigerian projects.
- [About](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/about): One of the best aluminium roofing sheet manufacturers in Nigeria, based in Ogun State.
- [Products](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/products): Buy aluminium long span roofing sheets, step tiles, Metcopo and Gerard stone-coated tiles direct from our Lagos factory.
- [Stone Coated Roofing Tiles](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/products/stone-coated): Gerard stone-coated roofing tiles in Lagos — Shingle, Bond, Classic, Milano & Roman profiles from ₦4,750/piece with 50-year warranty.
- [Pricing](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/pricing): Current 2026 prices for Long Span, Step Tiles, Metcopo and Gerard Stone Coated roofing sheets in Lagos.
- [Services](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/services): Professional aluminium roofing services in Lagos and across Nigeria — supply, delivery, and expert installation.
- [Gallery](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/gallery): Completed aluminium roofing projects, factory production, and colour options. Real jobs across Lagos and Nigeria.
- [Projects](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/projects): Sample aluminium roofing projects completed for homes, churches and commercial buildings in Lagos and across Nigeria.
- [Delivery](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/delivery): Same-day Lagos delivery and nationwide shipping of aluminium roofing sheets, step tiles and stone-coated tiles.
- [Blog](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/blog): Aluminium roofing guides, price updates and practical resources for homeowners, builders and contractors.
- [Resources](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/resources): Roofing guides, FAQs and blog posts to help you choose the right roofing sheets and plan your project.
- [FAQ](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/faq): Answers to common questions about aluminium roofing sheet prices, thickness, delivery and installation.
- [Contact](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/contact): Contact Gods Promise Aluminium in Sango Ota, Ogun State for free roofing quotes across Lagos and Nigeria.
- [Dealers](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/dealers): Partner with an aluminium roofing sheet manufacturer in Ogun State. Dealer and distributor opportunities.
- [Warranty](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/warranty): Product warranty, quality checks and returns process for aluminium roofing sheets.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/privacy): How we handle personal information collected through this website, contact forms and WhatsApp enquiries.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/terms): Terms and conditions for using this website and purchasing aluminium roofing products.
- [Locations](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/locations): Aluminium roofing company serving all 36 Nigerian states and FCT Abuja. Find delivery times, local FAQs and products for your state.

## Blog Posts

- [How Much Do Aluminum Roofing Sheets Cost in Lagos, Nigeria in 2025?](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/blog/aluminum-roofing-sheet-price-lagos-2025): A breakdown of aluminium roofing sheet prices in Lagos covering long span, step tiles, Metcopo and stone-coated options.
- [Types of Aluminium Roofing Sheets in Nigeria](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/blog/types-of-aluminium-roofing-sheets-nigeria): Complete guide to long span, step tile, Metcopo and stone-coated roofing sheet types in Nigeria with pros, cons and best uses.
- [Stone Coated Roofing Sheet Prices in Lagos 2026](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/blog/stone-coated-roofing-sheet-prices-lagos): Current stone-coated tile prices in Lagos for Shingle, Bond, Classic, Milano and Roman profiles with buying tips.
- [Longspan vs Step Tile vs Metcopo Comparison](https://www.godspromisealuminiumroofing.com/blog/longspan-vs-steptile-vs-metcopo-comparison): Side-by-side comparison of long span, step tile and Metcopo profiles covering cost, appearance, durability and ideal use cases.
